steps.title: Treat the expression as one unit
steps.content:
Let $u=4-3x$. The equation becomes easier to read.
$$7u+6=6u+20$$

steps.title: Solve for the unit
steps.content:
Subtract $6u$ from both sides, then subtract $6$ from both sides.
$$u+6=20$$
$$u=14$$
Since $u=4-3x$, the requested value is $14$.
The answer is D.
